releaseNotes: • Channel +/- while watching: open a channel from a list (search results, a category, favorites…) and you can now change channels without leaving the player. Tap the screen for the controls and use the new ▲/▼ buttons — or your remote's CH+/CH− keys — to move up and down through the same list the stream started on. Holding the button surfs quickly and only switches when you stop.
